gaps.gap: JD incomplete: Lever snapshot is truncated and contains only HTML/CSS boilerplate; actual job requirements, responsibilities, required qualifications, and scope are missing.
gaps.mitigation: Request full, unformatted JD text from SafetyCulture. Evaluate only after substantive requirements, experience expectations, and reporting line are provided.

gaps.gap: Role title 'Strategic Project Lead, AI Operations' suggests execution and AI domain focus, but scope, stakeholder level, and ownership breadth are unclear without full JD.
gaps.mitigation: Clarify whether role owns strategic transformation, execution only, or operational AI platform work. Confirm whether the candidate's agentic-tooling background and transformation experience align with stated scope.

gaps.gap: No visibility into company stage, team size, or reporting line; cannot calibrate seniority properly without this context.
gaps.mitigation: Confirm SafetyCulture size, stage, and reporting structure. L4 estimate assumes mid-scale company; early-stage or large-scale would shift level assessment.

output.level_rationale: Role title 'Strategic Project Lead' in Strategy & Operations department suggests L4–L5 scope with cross-functional project ownership. No years required, management scope, or explicit reporting line stated. Company size/stage unknown. Estimated L4 as a baseline. full JD needed to confirm scope and seniority anchors.".
output.summary: Candidate has strong Strategy and Operations background with eight years at Google and demonstrated agentic-tooling and transformation experience, aligning with the role family. However, the provided JD is incomplete—it contains only HTML/CSS boilerplate with no substantive job requirements, responsibilities, experience expectations, or scope details. Recommend obtaining the full, plain-text JD before proceeding with a confident evaluation. Role level cannot be calibrated reliably without clarity on company stage, team size, reporting line, and specific AI Operations scope.
uncertainties: JD snapshot is truncated HTML/CSS; actual job description text and requirements are not present
Company stage and size unknown; cannot anchor seniority estimate
Scope of 'AI Operations' and 'Strategic Project Lead' responsibilities unclear
No reporting line or team-size context provided
Unclear whether role emphasizes strategic transformation, operational execution, or platform/engineering delivery
